reviews.author: Akatsuki Rui
reviews.content: It keeps taking over the media control center, This causes background music that is using audio casting to pause and play the app's audio instead. Provide an option to disable this app from using the Media Control Center!

reviews.author: 翠霞清风
reviews.content: This used to be a good app, but it's really gone downhill. Now it's just full of promotional videos, and the screen is cluttered with two or three ads at a time. Most of the new videos, and even popular old ones, are behind a paywall. It's become genuinely difficult to find anything worth watching.

reviews.author: Joe Yves Borling
reviews.content: The app was good and I liked it. However, I only put 3 star instead of 5 since it doesn't have any English subtitle

reviews.author: spencer ii
reviews.content: Good app for quite a long time, but recently will quit when playing videos in full screen, how to fix it soon

reviews.author: onye enomate
reviews.content: It's a bit useless having an English translation of the app but no auto Matic translations for the subtitles like on YouTube.On YouTube, I can make auto subtitles in a video's original language automatically translate to English, Spanish or French since I speak those three languages, for example.

reviews.author: Matt Reynolds
reviews.content: Horrible app for watching. 5 ads before I can watch an episode with more ads in the middle of it. This review is for the international version which is supposedly better, but still absolute garbage.

reviews.author: Myrel Santos
reviews.content: I just wanted to watch Fabulous Beasts, but the navigation is too complicated 😔

reviews.author: Simpson Ou
reviews.content: Abysmally made app. It's a catch 22 where most shows are premium but trying to charge any b coins is impossible. Try to add alipay account doesn't work nor charging with other methods, it always says that there is an unknown error.... Another broken chinese app

reviews.author: Stan Lai
reviews.content: Since October 2025 I haven't been able to use my Visa credit card or Google pay or even my Wechat and Alipay accounts to pay for membership or buy any batteries, it says "foreign cards not accepted". Contacting customer service didn't help, as it appears tp be AI.

reviews.author: H M
reviews.content: I like it but after the update, the app keeps closing. I tried to uninstall and install it again but the same thing happened. so for now, I'll just uninstall it first and try again later.

reviews.author: Zaiyden Callahan
reviews.content: it does not play the start of the episode and the comments is blocking the screen l

reviews.author: Yasumi Hayashi
reviews.content: This is the Chinese Version that contain a load of ADs. the internetional verison is much more Better. this version contain games、shopping、and so much useless function.

reviews.author: Li Ferry
reviews.content: The app has a chance of getting crash if you have the old international version on your phone, don't know the reason yet...

reviews.author: Ian Smith
reviews.content: I want to verify but I cant because I'm 13 and I don't have the requirements like a passport that they take. my school id isn't a option Im not a Chinese resident so I don't have a card to verify with it's harder to verify with government id when I don't have that either I just want to upload videos why is it so dang hard to upload why does it have to be that hard why can't I just verify a easier way it's a pain because I don't have the requirements to verify if there's another way to verify

reviews.author: 刘宇睿
reviews.content: totally garbage .Too many ads.

reviews.content: actually not bad been using it for ages many great ups(whose who make videos) ,u will benefit alot

reviews.author: 4 3 (‪34Core_Pro‬)
reviews.content: This APP is definitely good after the International language update. Since. It has more personal channels.

reviews.author: Lucius Kyle
reviews.content: The white icon version is so good, but that one got cancelled, we are forced to use this one.

reviews.author: 西海枝蘭
reviews.content: most of users are not friendly, but i still recommend you to learn some academic strategies on bilibili if you are a student

reviews.content: I can't use AliPay or WeChatPay to buy something in this application!!!

reviews.author: Bill
reviews.content: I wish the app had a full English version because there's a lot of words still in Chinese. This app keeps getting better, each update has more translation for the app. Please add the forward and backward button for going back 10 seconds or 15 seconds. Thanks

reviews.author: key Lucas
reviews.content: More and more useless features are added.

reviews.author: Emilce Noa (20里山路)
reviews.content: This is Chinese spyware designed to steal user information. It requests your phone number, passport, proof of address, and software permission to access your contacts. Your account will be frozen, and your information will remain there permanently. I've tried it.

reviews.author: Frank
reviews.content: DO NOT INSTALL IT.TOO MANY ADS.

reviews.author: William Bingham
reviews.content: a lot more videos that interest me

reviews.author: Atom Delta
reviews.content: what do you mean by adding a banner ad under every video even if the playstore version is suppose to be adfree like it was before…

reviews.author: sherani sharma
reviews.content: easy navigation and very good features in terms of video playback options and the brightness and volume but I just wish there were more English/other language subtitles.....
